rows.label: tev016101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ian about conditions in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ian if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Ian about the Biahno
water-purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Ian if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0001
rows.name:
It's ridiculous for a city that supports
as many people as NLA to have only a
single water-purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0003
rows.name:
If our population were to
expand any further, water
shortages would be inevitable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0004
rows.name:
...What? You're wondering about
that large pool of liquid that
lies unused beneath the city?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0005
rows.name:
No, that's a shock-absorbing gel that
was used to lessen the impact of our
crash landing. It isn't potable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0006
rows.name:
But it IS the reason that the Habitat
unit was able to land safely after it
separated from the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0009
rows.name:
My research team is working to facilitate
the construction of a new water-purification
plant outside the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0010
rows.name:
However, the team is divided on how to
proceed, and having to reconcile the
differences has slowed our progress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ajoa wants to begin building
immediately, while Rosie feels
that would be premature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0012
rows.name: Personally, I agree with Ajoa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0013
rows.name:
But as team leader, I can't
promote either position. I
have to work toward consensus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Still, having to work through their
differences when I'm personally
raring to go has been tough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It's been a long road to this point,
but thanks to Ajoa's hard work, the
project is finally complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'm the team leader, but even I have to
acknowledge that this is her baby—she put in
a ton of work to make this dream a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0024
rows.name:
She's like a force of nature, and there's no
way I could compete with that! Hmm... Maybe
I should buy her a present or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0025
rows.name:
I mean, to show my appreciation for
her hard work, of course! That would
be my only motive, I assure you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0028
rows.name:
The completion of the Biahno
water-purification plant has
really been a load off my mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0029
rows.name: But I'm a little worried about Rosie...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0030
rows.name:
She fought tooth and nail against
the construction of the plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0031
rows.name:
And now that everyone's celebrating
its completion, I'm sure she
has some mixed feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I just hope that one day she'll
come to appreciate how our efforts
have solved NLA's water shortage.[ST:wait ]
